# CPA Field Guide
> Independent, vendor-neutral directory of US tax & accounting software for CPA and accounting firms — tax preparation, deadline monitoring, practice management, and bookkeeping. Every tool is defined, priced, and rated for how open it is to integration. No vendor pays for placement. Reviewed 2026-07-08.

## Categories
- [Tax Preparation](https://cpafieldguide.com/tax-preparation-software): Professional tax preparation software for US CPA firms: Drake, Lacerte, ProConnect, ProSeries, UltraTax CS, CCH Axcess, and ATX — what each does, who it fits, and how open it is to integration.
- [Deadline & Compliance Tracking](https://cpafieldguide.com/deadline-monitoring-software): Deadline tracking and compliance monitoring tools for CPA firms: File In Time, DueDateHQ, and ONESOURCE Calendar — passive trackers versus active monitors that watch the IRS, states, and FEMA.
- [Practice Management](https://cpafieldguide.com/practice-management-software): Practice management and workflow software for accounting firms: Karbon, TaxDome, Canopy, Financial Cents, Jetpack Workflow, Keeper, Firm360, Pixie, Aiwyn, and Ignition — features, firm-size fit, and API openness.
- [Accounting & Bookkeeping](https://cpafieldguide.com/accounting-software): General-ledger and bookkeeping software CPA firms use: QuickBooks Online, Xero, Bill.com, Sage, and the Intuit ProAdvisor channel — and how each connects to the rest of the firm stack.

## Guides
- [Compare all 25 tools (one table: category, price, integration)](https://cpafieldguide.com/compare)
- [CPA & accounting software with an open API](https://cpafieldguide.com/cpa-software-with-open-api)

- [Best software for small CPA firms](https://cpafieldguide.com/best-cpa-software-for-small-firms)

## Data
- [CPA software statistics 2026 (market share, pricing, APIs)](https://cpafieldguide.com/cpa-software-statistics)

## Tools
- [Drake Tax](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/drake-tax): Tax Preparation. From $2,145/yr. Export only. 
            Full 1040 and business tax-prep suite — the high-volume, low-cost favorite of sole
            practitioners.
          
- [Lacerte](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/lacerte): Tax Preparation. Custom · per-return. Local SDK. 
            Intuit's high-end desktop tax software for complex individual and business returns.
          
- [ProConnect](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/proconnect): Tax Preparation. Pay-per-return. No API yet. 
            Intuit's cloud professional tax prep, tied into QuickBooks Online Accountant.
          
- [ProSeries](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/proseries): Tax Preparation. From $419/yr. Export only. Intuit's desktop tax suite for higher-volume 1040 practices.
- [UltraTax CS](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/ultratax-cs): Tax Preparation. Custom quote. Export only. 
            Thomson Reuters' tax engine for mid-to-large firms; anchor of the CS Professional Suite.
          
- [CCH Axcess](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/cch-axcess): Tax Preparation. From $2,299/yr. Partner API. 
            Wolters Kluwer's cloud tax, document, and workflow suite for larger firms.
          
- [ATX](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/atx): Tax Preparation. From $939/yr. Export only. 
            Wolters Kluwer's budget, forms-based tax software for smaller practices.
          
- [File In Time](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/file-in-time): Deadline & Compliance Tracking. Paid license. Export only. 
            Records client due dates and rolls them forward each year — a classic passive tracker.
          
- [DueDateHQ](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/duedatehq): Deadline & Compliance Tracking. Free · beta. No API yet. 
            Monitors the IRS, states, and FEMA and flags which clients a filing-date change hits.
            Free in beta.
          
- [ONESOURCE Calendar](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/onesource-calendar): Deadline & Compliance Tracking. Custom quote. Gated API. 
            Thomson Reuters' enterprise compliance calendar for multi-entity tax deadlines.
          
- [Karbon](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/karbon): Practice Management. From $59/user/mo. Open API. 
            All-in-one practice management — workflow, email, and billing — with the category's
            deepest API.
          
- [TaxDome](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/taxdome): Practice Management. From $67/user/mo. Open API. 
            All-in-one practice management with a client portal, e-signature, and invoicing.
          
- [Canopy](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/canopy): Practice Management. From $45/user/mo. Gated API. Modular practice management: CRM, workflow, documents, and billing.
- [Financial Cents](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/financial-cents): Practice Management. From $19/user/mo. Gated API. 
            Lightweight workflow and client management with recurring tasks and a portal.
          
- [Jetpack Workflow](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/jetpack-workflow): Practice Management. From $36/user/mo. Gated API. Simple recurring-job and deadline tracking built for small firms.
- [Keeper](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/keeper): Practice Management. From $200/mo. Zapier only. 
            Month-end close and bookkeeping workflow with a two-way QuickBooks sync.
          
- [Firm360](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/firm360): Practice Management. From $49/user/mo. Zapier only. 
            All-in-one practice management — projects, documents, billing, and a portal.
          
- [Pixie](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/pixie): Practice Management. From $129/mo. Zapier only. 
            Simple practice management for small firms: client database, jobs, and email.
          
- [Aiwyn](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/aiwyn): Practice Management. Custom · enterprise. Partner API. 
            Billing and revenue-cycle automation for large firms, layered on existing systems.
          
- [Ignition](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/ignition): Practice Management. From $39/mo. Zapier only. 
            Proposals, engagement letters, and automated billing for accounting firms.
          
- [QuickBooks Online](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/quickbooks-online): Accounting & Bookkeeping. From $35/mo. Open API. 
            The dominant US small-business ledger — the book of record most firms work from.
          
- [Xero](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/xero): Accounting & Bookkeeping. From $25/mo. Open API. 
            Cloud accounting ledger, strong internationally, with a broad app ecosystem.
          
- [Bill.com](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/bill-com): Accounting & Bookkeeping. From $45/user/mo. Open API. AP/AR automation and payments for firms and their clients.
- [Sage](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/sage): Accounting & Bookkeeping. From ~$10/mo. Gated API. 
            Accounting from small business (Sage Accounting) to mid-market (Sage Intacct).
          
- [ProAdvisor](https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/proadvisor): Accounting & Bookkeeping. Free · program. Partner API. 
            Intuit's free accountant program around QuickBooks — discounts, training, and firm
            tools.
